sourcingNotes.poolAssessment: Explore hub's brief explicitly asks for a walk — 'the approach to the Peninsula, not just the view'. Commons has three strong CC-BY-SA track candidates and no comparable clean-licence option. Same SA override question as home-cover-01 applies. These candidates also sit near twinning territory with home-cover-01 candidate B (Cape Schanck walking trail); the editor should avoid approving the same underlying photograph in both slots.

candidates.licenseNotes: CC-BY-SA 4.0 — editor override required (see home-cover-01 policy question).
candidates.place: Bushrangers Bay — from Two Bays walking track
candidates.sourcingAgentNote: A literal walk-to-the-sea composition; the bay below is the payoff, the track is the story. Exactly the 'boots on' brief energy. Recommended primary if the editor is choosing between this slot and home-cover-01 for the same asset — I would put it here and pick a different image for home-cover-01, because Explore is the slot that actually needs the track perspective.

Literal named walking trail at Cape Schanck. Small resolution headroom — 2592px barely clears the 2400px minimum, no meaningful crop tolerance. Strong brief-fit. Would be my primary if candidate A is rejected or needed elsewhere.

candidates.place: Tea Tree Creek walking track, near Flinders — Mornington Peninsula National Park
candidates.sourcingAgentNote: A less-famous track — 'slippery walking track near Flinders leads you to the natural beauties of Mornington Peninsula National Park'. Editorial voice fit is strong; editorial weight is the soft fail because the image is a mid-track view rather than a landmark payoff. Good fallback; not as strong as A or B.

editorActionsRequested.question: If candidate A is approved here, the home-cover-01 shortlist should be told to not re-use the same photograph in candidate C of that slot. Is Explore the right home for this Bushrangers Bay track image?
editorActionsRequested.defaultIfNoReply: Explore hub wins the Bushrangers Bay asset; home-cover-01 picks from its other candidates.
